name: sam_deploy
description:
Deploys a serverless application onto AWS Cloud using AWS SAM (Serverless Application Model) CLI and CloudFormation.

Requirements:
- AWS SAM CLI MUST be installed and configured in your environment
- SAM project MUST be initialized using sam_init tool and built with sam_build.

This command deploys your SAM application's build artifacts located in the .aws-sam directory
to AWS Cloud using AWS CloudFormation. The only required parameter is project_directory. SAM will automatically
create a S3 bucket where build artifacts are uploaded and referenced by the SAM template.

Usage tips:
- When you make changes to your application's original files, run sam build to update the .aws-sam directory before deploying.

Returns:
    Dict: SAM deploy command output

application_name.description: Name of the application to be deployed
application_name.title: Application Name

project_directory.description: Absolute path to directory containing the SAM project (defaults to current directory)
project_directory.title: Project Directory

template_file.description: Absolute path to the template file (defaults to template.yaml)
template_file.title: Template File

s3_bucket.description: S3 bucket to deploy artifacts to. You cannot set both s3_bucket and resolve_s3 parameters
s3_bucket.title: S3 Bucket

parameter_overrides.description: CloudFormation parameter overrides encoded as key-value pairs
parameter_overrides.title: Parameter Overrides

capabilities.description: IAM capabilities required for the deployment
capabilities.title: Capabilities

config_file.description: Absolute path to the SAM configuration file
config_file.title: Config File

config_env.description: Environment name specifying default parameter values in the configuration file
config_env.title: Config Env

metadata.description: Metadata to include with the stack
metadata.title: Metadata

tags.description: Tags to apply to the stack
tags.title: Tags

resolve_s3.description: Automatically create an S3 bucket for deployment artifacts.  You cannot set both s3_bucket and resolve_s3 parameters
resolve_s3.title: Resolve S3
